name: Good Song Club
description: A small social media platform that allows you to share good songs with your friends. Think of it as a social layer on top of YouTube Music or a worldwide shared playlist. 💛

name: Concrete 95
description: Concrete 95 is a sound design webapp inspired by Musique Concrete with a Windows 95 aesthetic. It allows you to layer synth pads, melodies, and found sound randomly fetched from freesound.org to create a unique, ever-changing soundscape.

name: BPM Game
description: A very niche web-based game where a player listens to a metronome and guesses the BPM.

name: Dig This
description: Web application that generates a random music recommendation using the Discogs API
skills: React, Node.js, Discogs API, Product Design

name: Mood Palace
description: A web repository that allows me to upload ambient audio for anyone to listen

name: Lever
description: A Figma plugin I built which provides a consistent structure to Figma files.
